name: Light Pill #7 - The Star Gazer
description: The Star Gazer - A glowing capsule that reveals celestial patterns and cosmic connections to those who dare to look beyond. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Deep blue velvet robes with silver constellation patterns
Brass telescope that sees through time
Silver sandals that glow with starlight
Open observatory under a swirling galaxy
The stars wrote your story long before you learned to read it.
You must chart three new constellations in the night sky - one for your past, one for your present, and one for a future that could be. Name them with words that have no translation.
Must be taken under visible stars

properties.ai_prompt: Celestial fashion editorial of The Star Gazer in an open observatory under a swirling galaxy, wearing deep blue velvet robes with glowing silver constellation patterns, peering through a brass telescope that reveals cosmic secrets. Cosmic Blue aura with Steady Pulse energy, silver sandals glowing with starlight, cinematic lighting that makes the Milky Way visible in breathtaking detail, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible star trails and nebula colors.
